ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Implementation', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Recipient_Picklist__c, 'Michael McKay')), NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT(Recipient_Picklist__c), '(M)')), NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.DeveloperName, 'Consultants')), NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.DeveloperName, 'Client_Services')), $Profile.Name <> "SW Support", $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'BI Dev', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $UserRole.Name <> 'Manager Customer Onboarding and Education', $UserRole.Name <> 'Customer Onboarding and Education Manager', $UserRole.Name <> 'Dach - Solution Architect', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Cancellation_Reason_PickList__c, 'Closed Lost Opportunity')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose one of the managers marked '(M)' as the recipient
